title: A Toothless Iran? Missile and Drone Strikes Show It Can Still Inflict Pain.
summary_full: A wave of strikes across the Middle East in recent days shows that Iran has not lost the capacity to retaliate.
summary_public: A wave of strikes across the Middle East in recent days shows that Iran has not lost the capacity to retaliate.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran has not lost the capacity to retaliate
